title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A YouTube tutorial from AWS Developers on Infrastructure as Code using AWS CDK with Python. The video demonstrates building a serverless REST API by comparing manual AWS console setup against declarative infrastructure automation, covering DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway with practical deployment and teardown.
